title: Session Lifecycle Event
description: Emitted at session start, stop, compact, and resume to track session-level metadata.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the lifecycle event.

project.description: Project name from the working directory.

branch.description: Git branch active at the time of the event.

trust_score.description: Project trust score at session start/resume.

hooks_loaded.description: List of hook names loaded for this session.

agents_available.description: List of agent names available in this session.

active_plan.description: Path to the currently active plan file, if any.

session_duration_ms.description: Total session duration at stop/compact. Null at start.

actions_count.description: Total actions evaluated by the permission engine during this session.

blocks_count.description: Number of actions blocked during this session.

overrides_count.description: Number of user overrides during this session.

agents_invoked_count.description: Number of subagent invocations during this session.

commits_count.description: Number of git commits made during this session.
